refined_fr.refined_fr: Provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle identification, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into specific sub-functions clarifies scope and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a digital worksite model/map that includes terrain features, obstacles, and designated work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: Map terrain features of the worksite
Identify and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent designated work zones within the worksite model

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping
Apply geospatial data processing algorithms for work-zone representation
Integrate sensor data into a unified digital worksite model
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle mapping; apply geospatial data processing algorithms for work-zone representation; integrate sensor data into a unified digital worksite model

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle mapping
Integration complexity of sensor fusion and geospatial processing
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups related sensing and data processing functions with manageable coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model fidelity
High safety criticality requires robust error handling and validation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor fusion and geospatial processing separately if integration complexity increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and generation of the worksite model including terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Provides updated worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote systems and Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite model generation is core to NGHE Solution; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw data but does not process the worksite model; high diffusion risk if assigned here.
Teleoperation consumes model data but does not generate it; poor containment.
Safety Services uses model data for alerts but does not generate it; very poor containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite model generation in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and safety-critical validation.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the requirement; selected DP logically addresses each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
Dependency on Vehicle telemetry interface is well defined
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution; interfaces are well established and appropriate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module's output worksite model against ground truth and sensor data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and DP to IM with explicit interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Track integration complexity within NGHE Solution module
Ensure robust error handling for sensor data inaccuracies

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements with clear ownership, manageable coupling, and low diffusion risk. Safety criticality is addressed by centralized containment and explicit interfaces.
next_level_sub_frs: Map terrain features of the worksite
Identify and locate obstacles within the worksite
Represent designated work zones within the worksite model

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Sufficient processing capability in NGHE Solution
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model fidelity
Potential complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
evidence_needed: Validation test results of worksite model accuracy
Performance metrics of NGHE Solution processing
